title: lithocarpus handelianus
intro: Lithocarpus handelianus, also known as the Chinese tallow tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus handelianus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds. Lithocarpus handelianus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and decoction, which are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
